description.value: You can instantly merge with a creature you summon. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that summons a minion, you merge with the minion instead of summoning them. This works like animal form, except your form's Size, Speeds, AC, senses, attacks, and Athletics modifiers are identical to the summoned creature (you don't gain temporary Hit Points). If you're reduced to 0 Hit Points while merged with your summoned minion, the effect ends, and you return to your normal self with half as many Hit Points as you originally had when you first merged with your summoned minion.
